## What
Brief description of the change.

## Why
The motivation — what problem does this fix or what does it improve?

## Testing
- [ ] `npm test` passes (115 tests)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Tested in browser (if UI change)

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets or personal API keys committed
- [ ] `src/config.js` changes are backward-compatible or documented in the PR body
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by a test where practical
